candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred than explicit total.
Only a component of current assets, not the full total.
Direct match to cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet.
Also a direct match, appears as an alternate detailed/summary label.
Includes short-term investments, so broader than CHE.
Includes short-term investments, so broader than CHE.

variables.notes: Priority given to pure cash-equivalents labels over cash plus short-term investments.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Section header, not the reported total; less preferred.
Only a component of current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Clean total for short-term debt/current portion of LT debt, but appears to include capitalized leases.
Captures short-term borrowings component excluding current LT maturities.
Captures current maturities of long-term debt and matches the excluding-leases amount here.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Explicitly excludes leases and represents the current LT debt component; selected outside shortlist because it best matches baseline STD definition.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Avoided 'Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt' because it includes capitalized leases. Selected minimal non-lease components; 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' appears duplicative of the current portion excluding leases, so omitted to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match to taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Broader combined line including long-term, so less suitable than current-only taxes payable.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist; confident because it is the explicit current taxes payable line.

candidates.why: Best match for total/net PPE on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Alternative total net PPE line, but the standard total/net PPE is preferred.
Gross PPE exists, but net total is preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Preferred total/net PPE; included alternate total net PPE as lower-priority label.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: There are two identical 'Total Assets' rows in the preview, one blank/header-like and one populated; row label mapping uses the exact label, so selected 'Total Assets'.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match to net operating cash flow.
Statement section/header rather than the reported net cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow measure.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities

variables.notes: Chose the explicit net operating cash flow line.
